issues.description: Duration should be 'UntilStartOfNextTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text states 'until the start of your next turn' which is a distinct game phase.

Missing second action from [On Play] effect: 'you cannot add Life cards to your hand using your own effects during this turn'. This is a separate effect that should be a second action with duration 'DuringYourTurn'.

Condition type 'HasRestingDon' is checking for resting Don, but [DON!! x2] typically means Don cost (attached Don). Should verify if this is checking attached Don (HasAttachedDon with count:2) or resting Don state.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[On Play] Up to 1 of your Leader gains +2000 power until the start of your next turn. Then, you cannot add Life cards to your hand using your own effects during this turn.
[DON!! x2] [When Attacking] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 3000 power or less.
